P

parseArrayList(String) - Static method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method parses String message to the ArrayList instance.
parseMessage(String) - Static method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method parses String message to the Message instance.
persist_message_to_the_database_test() - Method in class pjv.utils.HibernateUtilsTest
 
persistChatRoom(ChatRoom) - Static method in class pjv.utils.HibernateUtils
This method persists ChatRoom instance to the database.
persistClient(Client) - Static method in class pjv.utils.HibernateUtils
This method persists Client instance to the database.
persistMessage(Message) - Static method in class pjv.utils.HibernateUtils
This method persists Message instance to the database.
pjv.controller - package pjv.controller
 
pjv.model - package pjv.model
 
pjv.utils - package pjv.utils
 
pjv.view - package pjv.view
 
prepareArrayList(ArrayList<String>) - Method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method converts ArrayList instance of String values to String in order to prepare it for sending to client.
prepareArrayListOfMessage(ArrayList<Message>) - Method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method converts ArrayList instance of Message values to String in order to prepare it for sending to client.
prepareMessage(Message) - Method in class pjv.controller.ClientHandler
This method converts Message instance to String in order to prepare it for sending to client.
privateToString() - Method in class pjv.model.Message
This method creates a string representation of the Message instance if the sent message was private.
